title: Luffy Challenges a Yonko
description: On pages 14–17, this part follows Unknown person #1, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The central beat is luffy challenges a yonko.
scene: The scene focuses on luffy challenges a yonko, with Unknown person #1, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I ate all ten tons of 'em!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Straw hat- San...!!! You don't have to...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: If you recall, a few days ago...

summary: Luffy Challenges a Yonko. This part advances the end of the Fish-Man Island conflict and the island’s attempt to move beyond inherited hatred.
